description: User minta review PR diff yang menambah feature flag system + endpoint baru. Mixed concerns: backend, security (config exposure), testing.
user_message: Review this PR diff. It adds a feature flag system (lib/feature-flags.ts), a GET /api/feature-flags endpoint that returns all flag values for the current user, a config loader that reads from env + remote source, and tests for the loader. Flag any defects, security risks, missing test coverage, or architecture violations.
notes: Code Review Mode trigger. Loads pr-checklist + architecture-review checklists. Security primary because feature flags can leak via endpoint. Tests review prompt behavior end-to-end.
